message:
feat(core): implement model_dump with Pydantic-compatible options

Add comprehensive model_dump() functionality (validate.rs - 180+ lines):
- DumpMode enum: Json (JSON-compatible) vs Python (Rust native types)
- DumpOptions builder with fluent API:
  - include/exclude: Field filtering
  - by_alias: Alias support (future use)
  - exclude_unset: Skip unset fields (requires tracking)
  - exclude_defaults: Skip default values
  - exclude_none: Skip None/null values
  - exclude_computed_fields: For future computed_field support
  - round_trip: Preserve types for re-parsing
- Full serde_json::Value filtering implementation
- Recursive handling for nested objects and arrays

Supporting changes:
- field.rs: Field metadata extensions
- lib.rs: Export new types
- parse.rs: Macro parsing for dump options

This provides Pydantic-style serialization control for SQLModel structs,
enabling flexible output formatting for APIs and data export.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
